description.ko: 플로라-9은 유기적 생명과 디지털 인프라의 궁극적인 합성을 나타내며, 데이터와 빛으로 구동되는 가상 생태계 속에서 번성하도록 진화한 식물 종을 묘사합니다.
description.en: FLORA-9 represents the ultimate synthesis of organic life and digital infrastructure, depicting a plant species evolved to thrive within a virtual ecosystem powered by data and light.

prompt: A futuristic bioluminescent plant named FLORA-9, featuring translucent crystalline leaves pulsing with neon cyan data streams, fiber-optic roots intertwining with a chrome-plated motherboard, floating digital pollen particles, dark cinematic background with volumetric lighting, 8k resolution, ultra-detailed cyberpunk botanical art.
